title: Go Messaging Observability, Capacity, and Alarms · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a low-cardinality messaging telemetry and capacity plan with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a low-cardinality messaging telemetry and capacity plan and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Interpret ready, unacknowledged, total, ingress, delivery, ack, redelivery, consumers, consumer capacity, connections, channels, and node resource metrics together; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Model arrival rate, service rate, concurrency, oldest age, burst, retry amplification, byte volume, and recovery time for capacity decisions; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Message Flow Telemetry
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go messaging team handles case 9271 during bounded worker pool during a dependency slowdown. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine backlog, age, alarm, consumer, and bounded-capacity evidence; prove cleanup under a single deadline and cancellation cause; then make one state notification stale after recovery generation changes. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Inspect the Message Flow Telemetry trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Messaging Slo Alert
steps.instruction:
